rationale: Keep: the citing paper’s central constructs and tests include "environmental cues" as a driver of WOM (observational coding plus field/lab cue manipulations), which closely aligns with the cited paper’s core contribution that incidental environmental cues increase product accessibility and influence evaluation/choice. Given this strong mechanism-level overlap in the notes (not just topical similarity), the citation is plausibly theoretical/foundational rather than an incidental mention.
